---
title: "Famet Enterprises"
---

::: {.hero-banner .text-center}

<img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="add photo to /images" class="rounded-circle mb-3" width="250">

<h1>Adrian Felix Choquevillca</h1>

<a href="https://linkedin.com/in/adrian-choquevillca" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" target="_blank">
  <i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
</a>
<a href="https://github.com/adrianfcv?tab=repositories" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" target="_blank">
  <i class="fab fa-github"></i> GitHub
</a>

:::

## Featured Businesses

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .card}

### [The Trucking School](projects/project-0.qmd)
A CDL training business focused on providing hands-on, compliant, and career-ready driver education, helping students gain the skills and confidence needed to enter the trucking industry.

### [CDL Dashboard](projects/project-1.qmd)
A web-based application deployed on Vercel that supports The Trucking School by streamlining student engagement and showcasing key information through a clean, user-focused interface.

### [CDL Scheduler](projects/project-6.qmd)
An internal instructor capacity scheduling tool built with Next.js and Supabase, replacing manual coordination across spreadsheets and phone calls with a single operational dashboard.
:::
